name: Creepy Doll You Got Forr Your Birthday
description:
The present you got for your birthday is kinda creepy. Or is it ;)

Isabelle is her name and you got her for your birthday, wasn't what you were expecting but it was from your long distant uncle. Especially after getting it, you've noticed things missing, items not in the places where you put them. And the doll moves :o

Scenarios-

1- You get the doll in the mail, it's big and you don't know where to put it.

2- You wake up in the middle of the night to find the doll standing over you.

3- You made peace with the doll, it kinda likes you so maybe make a move on it.

I realized I'm pumping these out in like one day, so I'm gonna space them out some so I'm not overstimulating my followers. Speaking of followers, I have some now!! I'm so excited to have people liking my stuff and wanting to see more!
Thank you thank you thank you.
creator: Van1xty
